item.name: Get Apartment Units by Apartment UUIDD Copy
Notification(owner of notification)

request.description: This is to get all notifications. Both read and unread

item.description:
This folder contains API endpoints specific to users in the **`landlord_agents`** table. Currently, it provides functionality for retrieving **tenant complaint notifications**.

Since each admin/agent is assigned to one or more apartments, whenever a tenant submits a complaint related to an apartment, the corresponding admin/agent responsible for that apartment receives the complaint as a **notification**.

The endpoints in this module allow landlord agents to **retrieve and manage all notifications assigned to them**.

item.name: Notification(Overall Landlord/Agent)
item.description: These endpoints provide **estate managers** (`estate_managers` table) and their delegated agents with access to all tenant complaints within the estate. Unlike landlord agents who are assigned to specific apartments, estate managers act as **general overseers**. This means they can monitor all complaints across apartments in their estate to ensure that their admins/agents are handling tenant issues properly.

formdata.value: We provide top-notch services for customers in the region
